name: Star Duets: A New Era
overview: “Star Duets: A New Era” is a Lithuanian television music show broadcast on LNK. The project brings together ten celebrity duos who perform popular songs live on stage each week. A unique feature of the format is that after the first four episodes, the lowest-ranked pair leaves the competition, and the show continues until the final, where the winning duet is crowned. The program combines music, entertainment, and celebrity charisma, offering viewers not only strong performances but also exciting competition and emotional stories.

trailers.title: 2025 - LNK - Žvaigždžių duetai. Nauja Era - Jau greitai [anonsas]
